tests_added: tests/audio/analyser.test.ts: createPipeline returns an object with frequency, timeDomain buffers and poll method
tests/audio/analyser.test.ts: pipeline buffers have length equal to frequencyBinCount
tests/audio/analyser.test.ts: poll() populates frequency and timeDomain buffers in place
tests/audio/analyser.test.ts: poll() returns the same buffer references on every call (no per-frame allocation)
tests/audio/analyser.test.ts: poll() is callable multiple times simulating per-frame usage
tests/audio/analyser.test.ts: pipeline works independently of gain/mute state
tests/audio/analyser.test.ts: pipeline does not access localStorage, sessionStorage, or cookies
tests/audio/player.test.ts: getPipeline() returns an AnalyserPipeline after initAudio()
tests/audio/player.test.ts: pipeline.poll() works when player state is suspended (autoplay blocked)
tests/audio/player.test.ts: pipeline.poll() works when player is muted
tests/audio/player.test.ts: pipeline buffers contain data after poll()
